text: Hi, welcome to a short overview about
agent assist analytics. The analytics
section is available on the left hand
side under the agent assist menu where
once you go there will be three key
views dashboards insight and export
data. The first one will give you a live
monitoring over what is currently
happening within the uh environment. So
how many ongoing chats? How many bot
chats? How many open chats? You know,
were there any chats did not match a
rule? Are there still any that are
waiting for assignment? What is uh the
pending chats which uh which are in
pending status or ones which are
awaiting response on the customer's end.
You will be able to see how many agents
are logged in, how many busy, how many
offline. uh we will also be able to go
ahead and give an average weight time or
max rate time that is currently there.
Time taken to assign the chats for the
current day will also be displayed over
here. That's created by uh for the
current day again would be visible and
then we will be able to also see our
average performance metrics in terms of
what was our first response time what's
the average what is the maximum in both
response time and resolution time as
well. Further along, we can see
summaries by agent or team level where
you will be able to see how people are
performing across the board. And last
but not the least, if you have enabled
feedback, you should be able to see how
the feedback ratings have been going as
well. The next part would be to get into
insights. Now this is where you have
more detailed reports including chart
level metrics where you should be able
to go ahead and see more uh more details
including overall summaries trends
priorities FRD summaries resolution
summaries and response time as well. You
can see over here that we can show
overall metrics first response time
average response time. Again a bit more
visual and graphical for you to be able
to take the uh data in. You can also
look at chats created within business
hours versus chats created in non-b
businessiness hours. Similarly, there
are other reports which uh include uh
the agent login logout time. So you'll
be able to see how the teams are
performing. You know what are the login
times, dates and so on. You further can
also dig into the agent chart summary.
How many fresh chats were assigned? How
many chats worked upon by the agent?
What's the total chats completed? All
that data would be at your fingertips.
We can also go back into the dashboard
and if we are looking for some specific
uh charts then in the chart dashboard
itself you can search for a keyword. So
we will go ahead and uh search for a
keyword here. Now in this case uh and if
we update the filter uh we we you can
see that I can look at certain time
range and we can say okay I'm looking
for data from any time. There are
actually two charts. If I wish to
download this, I will be able to select
a file name, you know, uh, chats with
pubshop and we'll be able to go ahead
and decide what all parameters do we
wish to export uh, accordingly. Once you
do click on export, this data would go
into the export uh, option and then we
will be able to go ahead and download
it. So here you can see under export
data the the report is now ready and we
can press the download button.
Thank you.
